requirement_topic.en: ERC and Utility Rules for Grid-Connected Storage
requirement_topic.zh: 并网储能的ERC及电网公司规则
requirement_topic.zht: 併網儲能的ERC及電網公司規則

summary.en: Thailand electricity projects are regulated by the Energy Regulatory Commission under the energy-industry legal framework. A grid-connected BESS may require ERC licensing or exemption analysis, utility interconnection review, metering, protection, power-quality, communication, commissioning, and PPA or programme-specific acceptance depending on whether the storage is standalone, co-located with generation, behind-the-meter, or part of a regulated power project.
summary.zh: 泰国电力项目由能源监管委员会在能源行业法律框架下监管。并网BESS是否需要ERC许可或豁免分析，以及电网公司并网审查、计量、保护、电能质量、通信、调试、PPA或项目计划特定验收，取决于储能是独立项目、与发电共址、用户侧还是受监管电力项目的一部分。
summary.zht: 泰國電力項目由能源監管委員會在能源行業法律框架下監管。併網BESS是否需要ERC許可或豁免分析，以及電網公司併網審查、計量、保護、電能品質、通信、調試、PPA或項目計劃特定驗收，取決於儲能是獨立項目、與發電共址、用戶側還是受監管電力項目的一部分。

standards_or_laws: ERC energy-industry licensing and regulatory notices
EGAT / MEA / PEA grid-connection and project requirements

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 36558 for electrochemical energy storage system grid-connected requirements and project-specific State Grid or China Southern Power Grid rules. These Chinese grid documents do not substitute for ERC licensing analysis or Thai utility interconnection acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 36558作为电化学储能系统并网要求，并适用国家电网或南方电网项目规则。这些中国并网文件不能替代ERC许可分析或泰国电网公司并网验收。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 36558作為電化學儲能系統併網要求，並適用國家電網或南方電網項目規則。這些中國併網文件不能替代ERC許可分析或泰國電網公司併網驗收。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid project rules

gap.en: The main gap is project approval rather than factory certification. Exporters should prepare PCS type-test evidence, relay and protection settings, anti-islanding and ride-through data, harmonic and flicker data, communication protocol evidence, single-line diagrams, metering design, commissioning procedures, and Thai-language submittals for the project owner, ERC adviser, and utility.
gap.zh: 主要差距在项目批准而非工厂认证。出口商应准备PCS型式试验证据、继电保护和保护定值、防孤岛和穿越数据、谐波和闪变数据、通信协议证据、单线图、计量设计、调试程序以及泰文提交资料，供项目业主、ERC顾问和电网公司审查。
gap.zht: 主要差距在項目批准而非工廠認證。出口商應準備PCS型式試驗證據、繼電保護和保護定值、防孤島和穿越數據、諧波和閃變數據、通信協議證據、單線圖、計量設計、調試程序以及泰文提交資料，供項目業主、ERC顧問和電網公司審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the BESS is part of a licensed or grid-connected electricity project; scope depends on ERC rules, project structure, utility connection point, and contract conditions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese grid connection where the relevant grid-company and project-approval requirements apply

source.publisher: Office of the Energy Regulatory Commission (Thailand)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558 evidence does not clear Thai grid connection. ERC licensing analysis and utility acceptance should be handled at project level before energisation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558证据不能完成泰国并网。送电前应在项目层面处理ERC许可分析及电网公司验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558證據不能完成泰國併網。送電前應在項目層面處理ERC許可分析及電網公司驗收。
